subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Rejoice thou in that the Wronged One maketh mention of thee from this Station, which hath been designated by the Most Excellent Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد ان افرح بما یذکرک المظلوم فی هذا المقام الذی سمی بالاسماء الحسنی من
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @chastisement and requital
